💾 Export / Import App
Full app snapshot — includes all data, settings, tab structure, and configuration.
⇓
Export App
Download full backup as JSON
Exports everything: leads, clients, tasks, notes, scripts, outreach, invoices, projects, calendar, tab structure, and all settings.
Loading...
⇑
Import App
Restore from a JSON backup
Restores all data exactly as it was when exported. Works only with files exported via "Export App" from this app.
⚠ This replaces ALL current data. Export a backup first.
🗑 Danger Zone
Permanently delete all data from this browser. Cannot be undone.
📋 Leads & WhatsApp Settings
Control phone click behavior, WhatsApp integration, auto-messages, and lead features.
💬 WhatsApp Integration
⭐ Recommended Setup — Sab Activate Karo
Phone Click → Option 5 (AI DM → Auto Send via WA)
Click karo → AI message auto-generate hoga (Cold DM ya Follow-up) → WhatsApp pre-filled message ke saath khulega. Ek click mein sab.
⚡ Auto-select: pehli baar Cold DM, baad mein Follow-up (lead history se detect hota hai)
Phone Click Action
WhatsApp Platform
Default Country Code (e.g. 92 for Pakistan — jab number 0 se start ho)
Auto-Message on WA Click (use {name} for lead name, {niche} for their niche)
Test WA Click (uses your settings above):
📋 Lead Table Features
Default Follow-up Days (after logging action)
🗂 Kanban Pipeline Stages
Customize your pipeline stages for the Kanban view. Drag to reorder.
💬 AI DM Flow — Full Pitch Trainer
Shared base training + har message type ki alag settings. AI exactly usi tarah likhega jo tum chahte ho.
SHARED 🧠 Base Training — Sab tabs yeh use karenge
Agency / Brand Name
Your Name (Sender)
Primary Service
Language
Custom Service (overrides dropdown)
What You Do — AI Base Context (1-2 lines)
Result / Proof / USP (injected into every message)
🎓 Global Training Rules — Apply to ALL message types
✅ Global MUST DOs
🚫 Global MUST NOTs
⚠ Forbidden Words (comma separated)
💡 Global Extra Instructions
💬 WhatsApp Auto-Redirect
Generate ke baad WA button aata hai — message pre-filled. Ek tap mein send.
🎬 Scenario Step Training
Har scenario step ka instruction customize karo. Blank = default (hardcoded). AI exactly waise likhega jo tum define karo.
👁 AI Prompt Preview — Cold DM
💡 Jitna specific MUST DO aur MUST NOT — utna consistent AI messages.
🤖 Smart Automation
Set rules that trigger automatically when lead actions happen. No code needed.
⚡ Automation Engine
Enable / disable all automation rules at once
Automation Rules
⚡ Quick-Add Templates
🎯 New Lead → Notify
Show notification when new lead added
⚡ Follow-up Due → Alert
Daily alert for overdue follow-ups
✅ Interested → Auto-Qualify
Auto-set status to Qualified when marked interested
🚨 No DM 3+ Days → Alert
Alert when lead hasn't been contacted in 3+ days
💬 DM Sent → Schedule Follow-up
Auto-schedule follow-up 2 days after DM
📞 Call Logged → Follow-up 3d
After call logged, auto-set 3-day follow-up
💬 Interested → Send WA
Auto-open WhatsApp when lead shows interest
⚡ Interested → Open AI DM
Auto-open AI DM generator for interested leads

API Settings

All AI features enabled · Content generation, chat, and agent tasks are running
ON
Active AI Provider
Keys stored locally — never sent to any server except the AI provider directly.
🖼 Image Generation APIs

Data Management
Clear all saved posts, stats, keys, and settings from your browser.
Ax Axai Engine — Dedicated CRM AI
Your personal AI brain — separate from Studio. Powers Axai Chat V2 Pro. Free & fast.
Not Connected
Add a Groq key below to activate Axai Engine
⚡
Groq — Recommended (FREE)
Llama 3.3 70B · Blazing fast · Free tier generous · No credit card needed
Not Set
Get free key → console.groq.com  |  Model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile  |  ⚡ Auto-saves as you type
🔀
OpenRouter — Fallback (FREE models available)
Used if Groq is unavailable · 50+ models · Gemini 2.0 Flash free
Not Set
Get free key → openrouter.ai  |  ⚡ Auto-saves as you type
⚙ Engine Model
Groq models need Groq key. OpenRouter models need OpenRouter key.
How Axai Engine works:
• Keys saved locally — never leave your browser
• Axai Chat V2 Pro uses Engine first, then falls back to Studio provider
• Groq is free with generous limits (~14,400 requests/day)
• Engine model is separate from Studio content generation model
